name: Protected Health Information
description: Health information that identifies an individual or for which there is a reasonable basis to believe can be used to identify an individual

name: Electronic Protected Health Information
description: PHI that is stored, transmitted, or maintained in electronic form

name: Medical Records
description: Patient clinical information, diagnoses, treatments, medical history

name: Billing Information
description: Invoice, payment, insurance claim, financial information

name: Genetic Data
description: Genetic testing results, hereditary information

name: Biometric Data
description: Fingerprints, voiceprints, retinal scans

name: Mental Health Information
description: Mental health diagnoses, psychotherapy notes (requires special authorization)

name: Substance Use Disorder Data
description: Information regarding substance use disorder diagnosis, treatment, or referral. Subject to additional protections under 42 CFR Part 2.

name: Demographic Information
description: Name, address, birth date, race, ethnicity, gender

name: Contact Information
description: Email address, phone number, emergency contacts

name: Personal Identifiers
description: SSN, MRN, Health Plan Beneficiary Number, Device Identifiers

name: Data at Rest
description: ePHI stored on servers, databases, endpoints, or removable media

name: Data in Transit
description: ePHI being transmitted across networks, internet, or email

name: Data in Use
description: ePHI currently being accessed, processed, or viewed in applications

name: Expert Determination Method
description: Statistical/scientific expert determines and documents risk is very small that information could be used to identify an individual

name: Safe Harbor Method
description: Removal of 18 specific identifiers (names, geographic subdivisions smaller than state, dates, SSNs, etc.) with no actual knowledge data could be used to identify

name: Limited Data Set
description: PHI that excludes 16 categories of direct identifiers. May include city, state, ZIP code, and dates. Can only be used for research, public health, or healthcare operations.

name: Data Use Agreement
description: Contract required before disclosing a Limited Data Set. Specifies permitted uses, establishes who may use data, and prevents re-identification attempts.

name: Minimum Necessary Standard
description: Principle requiring covered entities to make reasonable efforts to limit PHI use, disclosure, and requests to the minimum necessary to accomplish intended purpose.

name: Treatment Exception
description: Minimum necessary standard does not apply to disclosures to or requests by healthcare providers for treatment purposes.

name: Individual Request Exception
description: Minimum necessary standard does not apply to disclosures to the individual who is the subject of the information.

name: Authorization Exception
description: Minimum necessary standard does not apply to uses or disclosures made pursuant to an individual's authorization.

name: HHS Compliance Exception
description: Minimum necessary standard does not apply to disclosures required for HHS compliance investigations.

name: Required by Law Exception
description: Minimum necessary standard does not apply to uses or disclosures required by law.

name: Treatment
description: Provision, coordination, or management of healthcare

name: Payment
description: Activities to obtain reimbursement, billing, claims processing

name: Healthcare Operations
description: Administrative, quality improvement, compliance activities

name: Public Health Activities
description: Disease surveillance, health monitoring, public health reporting

name: Law Enforcement
description: Criminal investigation, legal subpoena compliance

name: Marketing
description: Marketing communications and promotional activities

name: Research
description: Health research and clinical studies

name: Organ/Tissue Donation
description: Facilitation of organ or tissue donation

name: Workers Compensation
description: Compliance with workers compensation laws

name: Judicial/Administrative Proceedings
description: Court orders and litigation support

name: Reproductive Health Information
description: Information related to reproductive health care. Under 2024 HIPAA Privacy Rule modifications, this is subject to heightened protections to prevent use for investigating or imposing liability on individuals seeking lawful reproductive health care.
